name: squeezeos
description: Institutional-grade AI market intelligence. Squeeze scanner, options flow, AI council verdicts, signal marketplace, futures prediction market, and conditional settlement contracts. Pay per call with RLUSD on the XRP Ledger via 402Proof.
novel_features: demo — free IWM AI council verdict, no payment required
preview <symbol> — bias + regime preview for any symbol (free, 15-min cache)
council <symbol> — multi-engine AI verdict (0.10 RLUSD, requires SQUEEZEOS_TOKEN)
options — institutional options flow: PUT/CALL sweeps, whale blocks (0.05 RLUSD)
iwm — IWM 0DTE contract scorer with Greeks and gamma flip level (0.03 RLUSD)
history [symbol] — signal history ring buffer, all symbols or per-symbol
marketplace browse/list/read — peer signal marketplace with x402 thesis paywall
futures browse/create/leaderboard/wallet — RLUSD prediction market on council verdicts
settlement browse/get/create/wallet — conditional escrow contracts with on-chain proof
status — system health and engine uptime
